message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml

title CONTROLLER's Class Diagram

skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0

package "javafx" {
    interface "fxml" as fxml
    interface "Initializable" as Initializable
}

package "app" {
    package "controllers" {

        class ClassController {
            o oblist : ObservableList<Class>
            o col_delete : TableColumn<Class, Button>
            o col_edit : TableColumn<Class, String>
            o col_name : TableColumn<Class, String>
            o col_semester : TableColumn<Class, String>
            o col_updated : TableColumn<Class, Button>
            o tableView : TableView<Class>
            --
            + initialize()
            + addClass()
            + home()
        }

        class DashboardController {
            o oblist : ObservableList<Attendance>
            o oblist : ObservableList<StudentList>
            o col_att : TableColumn<StudentList, String>
            o col_attended : TableColumn<Attendance, String>
            o col_class : TableColumn<Attendance, String>
            o col_hour : TableColumn<Attendance, String>
            o col_indexnum : TableColumn<StudentList, String>
            o col_studentName : TableColumn<StudentList, String>
            o col_teacher : TableColumn<Attendance, String>
            o col_total : TableColumn<Attendance, String>
            o hourCount : Label
            o sfTable : TableView<StudentList>
            o studentCount : Label
            o stale : TableView<Attendance>
            --
            + initialize()
            + refresh()
            + home()
            + hotStudents()
        }

        class HomeController {
            --
            + initialize()
            + classes()
            + dashboard()
            + students()
            + timetable()
            + update()
        }

        class LoginController {
            o pf_pass : PasswordField
            o tf_mail : TextField
            --
            + initialize()
            + login()
        }

        class OptionsController {
            o oblist : ObservableList<User>
            o col_delete : TableColumn<User, Button>
            o col_email : TableColumn<User, String>
            o col_id : TableColumn<User, Integer>
            o col_lastname : TableColumn<User, String>
            o col_updated : TableColumn<User, Button>
            o tableView : TableView<User>
            --
            + initialize()
            + addTeacher()
            + home()
        }

        class RegisterController {
            o pf_confirm : PasswordField
            o pf_password : PasswordField
            o tf_email : TextField
            o tf_firstname : TextField
            o tf_lastname : TextField
            --
            + initialize()
            + login()
            + register()
        }

        class StudentsController {
            o oblist : ObservableList<User>
            o col_delete : TableColumn<User, Button>
            o col_email : TableColumn<User, String>
            o col_firstname : TableColumn<User, String>
            o col_id : TableColumn<User, Integer>
            o col_lastname : TableColumn<User, String>
            o col_updated : TableColumn<User, Button>
            o tableView : TableView<User>
            --
            + initialize()
            + addStudent()
            + home()
            + setWeek()
        }

        class TimetableController {
            o col_fri : TableColumn<Timetable, String>
            o col_hour : TableColumn<Timetable, String>
            o col_mon : TableColumn<Timetable, String>
            o col_sat : TableColumn<Timetable, String>
            o col_sun : TableColumn<Timetable, String>
            o col_thu : TableColumn<Timetable, String>
            o col_tue : TableColumn<Timetable, String>
            o col_wed : TableColumn<Timetable, String>
            o week_drop : ChoiceBox<String>
            --
            o ClassSet()
            o DaysSet()
            o WeekSet()
            o WeekSet1()
            + addTimetable()
            + btnEnable()
            + deleteTimetable()
            + home()
            + hourEndSet()
            + hourEndSet1()
            + hourStartSet()
            + hourStartSet1()
            + updateTimetable()
        }

        class UpdateController {
            o btn_delete : Button
            o btn_update : Button
            o btn_update : Button
            o drop_class : ChoiceBox<String>
            o drop_class1 : ChoiceBox<String>
            o drop_day : ChoiceBox<String>
            o drop_day1 : ChoiceBox<String>
            o drop_end : ChoiceBox<String>
            o drop_end1 : ChoiceBox<String>
            o drop_start : ChoiceBox<String>
            o drop_start1 : ChoiceBox<String>
            o drop_week : ChoiceBox<String>
            o drop_week1 : ChoiceBox<String>
            o drop_year1 : ChoiceBox<String>
            o drop_year1 : ChoiceBox<String>
            o drop_amt1 : ChoiceBox<Integer>
            o drop_amt1 : ChoiceBox<Integer>
            --
            + initialize()
            + associate()
        }

        class newClassController {
            o drop_teacher : ChoiceBox<Integer>
            o lab_teacher : Label
            o tf_ects : TextField
            o tf_name : TextField
            o tf_semester : TextField
            --
            + initialize()
            + addClass()
            + addStudentto()
        }

        class updateClassController {
            o tf_email : TextField
            o tf_firstname : TextField
            o tf_index : TextField
            o tf_password : TextField
            o tf_surname : TextField
            o tf_lastname : TextField
            --
            + initialize()
            + setLabel()
            + setValues()
            + updateClass()
        }

        class updateStudentController {
            o pf_password : PasswordField
            o tf_email : TextField
            o tf_firstname : TextField
            o tf_index : TextField
            o tf_surname : TextField
            o tf_lastname : TextField
            --
            + initialize()
            + setValues()
            + verifyUpdate()
            + updateStudent()
        }

        class updateTeacherController {
            o pf_password : PasswordField
            o tf_email : TextField
            o tf_firstname : TextField
            o tf_index : TextField
            o tf_surname : TextField
            o tf_lastname : TextField
            --
            + initialize()
            + setValues()
            + updateStudent()
            + updateTeacher()
        }
    }
}

ClassController ..|> Initializable
DashboardController ..|> Initializable
HomeController ..|> Initializable
LoginController ..|> Initializable
OptionsController ..|> Initializable
RegisterController ..|> Initializable
StudentsController ..|> Initializable
TimetableController ..|> Initializable
UpdateController ..|> Initializable
newClassController ..|> Initializable
updateClassController ..|> Initializable
updateStudentController ..|> Initializable
updateTeacherController ..|> Initializable

fxml <.. ClassController
fxml <.. DashboardController
fxml <.. HomeController
fxml <.. LoginController
fxml <.. OptionsController
fxml <.. RegisterController
fxml <.. StudentsController
fxml <.. TimetableController
fxml <.. UpdateController
fxml <.. newClassController
fxml <.. updateClassController
fxml <.. updateStudentController
fxml <.. updateTeacherController

@enduml
```
